problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Viral. Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
